headline: Netflix (NFLX) Is Buying Ben Affleck's AI Film Startup For $587 Million
summary: Netflix acquired InterPositive, an AI-focused film post-production startup co-founded by Ben Affleck, in a cash deal valued at $587 million. The company disclosed the transaction as it moves to integrate artificial intelligence tools more deeply into its content production workflows. The deal highlights Netflix's interest in applying AI to editing, visual effects, and other post-production tasks across its film slate.
